title: [IOS] Location sharing dialogue - Allow Once option is selected
scenario: Location sharing dialog reappears after app restart when 'Allow Once' is selected during first-time onboarding in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time.
3. Observe the location sharing dialog that appears with options 'Allow Once', 'Allow While Using App', and 'Don't Allow'.
5. Verify that the Home Screen is displayed.
6. Navigate to App Settings → Find My Device.
7. Confirm that the location sharing dialog does not reappear during this session.
8. Close and restart the Poly Studio Mobile app.
9. Observe the Home Screen after relaunch.
expected: The location sharing dialog is shown again on the Home Screen after restarting the app, as expected for the 'Allow Once' permission behavior.
